channel.title: MBallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MBallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Puerto Rico stops for 13 minutes to applaud history and bask in Bad Bunny's glow
item.description: The Super Bowl lasted all of 13 minutes for many Puerto Ricans in San Juan and beyond.

item.title: The Verdict Is In: Everyone Hates Southwestâs New Seat And Boarding Rules
item.description: Southwestâs new assigned seating has put its reputation with Americans who have loved the brand through other turbulence at risk.

item.title: If SCOTUS Bans Illegals From The Census, Dems Could Lose Power For Years
item.description: Census figures used for congressional apportionment, redistricting, and redistributing federal funds have historically counted illegal aliens.

item.title: Cuomo Getting A Radio Show Instead Of Prison Proves Thereâs A Two-Tiered Justice System
item.description: Maybe we should wait until the criminal investigation is over before we hand out radio shows. Maybe facing consequences should come before rehabilitat...

item.title: How Congress Can Rein In Rogue Federal Judges
item.description: It is time for Congress to rethink its federal statutes that govern the discipline of judges.

item.title: Hereâs Where Prosecutors Should Look For More Evidence Of Somali Daycare Fraud
item.description: Prosecuting those involved with sham daycare centers should be relatively easy, using an assortment of readily available financial records.

item.title: How Sheikh Tahnoon Bought the UAEâs Way into Trump World
item.description: When Trump won the 2024 election, Tahnoon saw his opportunity to influence the U.S. government.

item.title: Cornyn trails Paxton in Texas Senate GOP primary; Crockett leads Talarico in Democratic race
item.description: Sen. John Cornyn's reelection bid is looking shaky in Texas.

item.title: The Best Chagos Deal Is No Deal
item.description: The Trump administration should step up political pressure on Starmer to change course.

item.title: Goodbye, Kostyantynivka
item.description: Not too long ago, the eastern Ukrainian city helped build my family. Now, the town is little more than ruins.

item.title: DOJ reaches legal settlement declaring Biden's border 'parole' to be unlawful
item.description: The Trump administration has quietly struck a legal settlement that not only ends one of President Biden's mass migrant "parole" programs but could bl...

item.title: Maryland Gov. Wes Moore says Democrats have 'oligation' to consider new congressional map
item.description: Gov. Wes Moore says the Maryland state Senate has an "obligation to vote" on legislation to redraw the state's congressional map -- a move Democrats h...

item.title: Nicaraguan government blocks key pathway used by Cuban migrants to reach United States
item.description: Nicaragua's government on Sunday blocked Cuban citizens from entering the country without a visa, effectively cutting off a key route for Cuban migrat...

item.title: We Need a Private-Sector Overhaul of U.S. Space Exploration
item.description: The scrubbed Artemis launch is the latest saga of an inefficient, unfocused government-run space program.

item.title: Thirty Candles for the Internetâs Foundation
item.description: Internet free speech is celebrating its 30th birthday â if Section 230âs opponents donât spoil the party, that is.
